title: Ordering Pizza
content: After a long and tiring workday, Jason did not want to cook dinner. He picked up his phone and ordered a large pizza online. While waiting, he changed into comfortable clothes and watched television on the sofa. About thirty minutes later, the delivery driver arrived at his apartment. The pizza smelled amazing, and the cheese was still very hot. Jason ate while watching his favorite comedy show. It was not a fancy dinner, but it was exactly what he needed after such a stressful day.
